heading: Create a MongoDB Search Index
body:
To create a search index for the specified deployment using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas deployments search indexes create [indexName] [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas deployments search indexes create](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-deployments-search-indexes-create).

To learn more about how to use the Atlas CLI to create a local
Atlas deployment, see [Create a Local Atlas Deployment](atlas/cli/current/atlas-cli-deploy-local).

Related Links

- [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

- [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)
